task: White to move — CHECKMATE in one!
hint: Move the Queen close to the King.
wrongMsg: King escaped! No escape squares needed.

task: Rook to give checkmate! King is cornered!
hint: Rook on B2 slides to A2.
wrongMsg: Not checkmate! Try Rook to A2.

task: Back rank checkmate! Move the Rook!
hint: Slide the Rook all the way to A8!
wrongMsg: The King still has escape squares!

task: Knight Fork! Find the square attacking BOTH the King and another piece!
okMsg: Fork! Knight attacks two at once! 🍴

task: A FREE piece to capture! Find it!
hint: The Black Queen on D7 is unprotected.
wrongMsg: Look for an undefended enemy piece!

task: King is in CHECK! Move to safety!
hint: The E-file is dangerous! Move sideways.

task: Skewer! Attack the King — win the piece behind!
hint: Rook up the D-file to attack King on D7!
wrongMsg: A skewer attacks the MORE valuable piece first!
